feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP C4C : Email Validation using BADI : ValidateReceipientEmail
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have tried a Email Validation using BADI : #ValidateReceipientEmail. Have tried to concatenate all the email in TO, CC & BCC. Below is the code snippet for your reference -

/*
Add your SAP Business ByDesign scripting language implementation for:
Enhancement Option: ValidateRecipientEmail
Operation: VALIDATE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL
 
Script file signature
----------------------------
Parameter: InputData of type RecipientEmailIn
Returns: ValidateRecipientEmailOut
Author: Subhankar Chakraborty
*/
 
import AP.CRM.Global;
import AP.Common.Global;
import AP.Common.GDT;
import AP.PlatinumEngineering;
 
var result : ValidateRecipientEmailOut;
var validEmail : Indicator;
var inputEmail : RecipientEmailIn;
var Email : EmailURI;
 
var ToEmail = InputData.TOEmailAddress.content;
var CCEmail = InputData.CCEmailAddress.content;
var BCCEmail = InputData.BCCEmailAddress.content;
 
var resultData : collectionof DataType::LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_EXTENDED_Text;
 
//Concat sting with the split variable at the end of the string
var Comma = ";";
var con;
var len;
//For Checking To Email
if (!ToEmail.IsInitial() || !CCEmail.IsInitial() || !BCCEmail.IsInitial())
{
// Having all the email id in a variable
con = ToEmail + Comma + CCEmail + Comma + BCCEmail + Comma;
}
 
//find the length
len = con.Length();
//variable for holding the position of the split variable in the string
var split_pos;
//variable for holding the loop value
var loop_var = 0;
// Variable for holding the sting position of the Sting
var string_pos = 0;
//Split based on Blank
var loc_split = Comma;
//local variable got holding the length of the sub string
var sub_str_len;
//local variable for holding sub string
var sub_string;
while (len >= loop_var)
{
if (len <= string_pos)
{
break;
}
split_pos = con.Find(loc_split, string_pos);
if (loop_var > 0)
{
sub_str_len = split_pos - string_pos;
}
else
{
sub_str_len = split_pos;
}
sub_string = con.Substring(string_pos, sub_str_len).Trim();
resultData.Add(sub_string);
string_pos = split_pos + 1;
loop_var = loop_var + sub_str_len;
}
var HaveMultipleEmail = resultData.Where(n => n.Length() > 0);
 
foreach (var checkAllEmail in HaveMultipleEmail)
{
// Mail.CheckEmailAddress -> This is from Platenium Engineering for validating the e-mail
result.IsEmailValid = Mail.CheckEmailAddress(checkAllEmail);
if(result.IsEmailValid == false)
{
result.IsEmailValid = false;
}
else
{
result.IsEmailValid = true;
}
}
return result;
 
This code is in reference to -https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_FOR_CUSTOMER/4ca099b3968e4b1d8201e98bc0b96edc/f0362840f6cb41f1818cde982bc6b54a.html
And the Influence Link is - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/308741

entry.title: Collection Management - Manage Collection Strategies
entry.content: Inside the "Manage Collection Strategies" APP, what does the "Aging Periods" section affects? & What is the purpose of it.

entry.title: Email Notification after Screening Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Dear,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition for Asset Management, there is the following request: in the screening phase, while in the "Screen Maintenance Request" tile, we can accept/reject a maintenance request (Y1) > since there is no existing workflow for notifications, how can we alert (sending an email) the technician to say if a maintenance request has been accepted/rejected? Creating a custom output item?

If there is an existing solution, can you please elaborate?

I have a reference here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-set-up-the-email-notification-for-flexible-workflow-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13524492 but as stipulated, this is for a workflow.

 

Thank you very much,

 

Dany R.

entry.title: System status WCRE is active (ACT 1000020 0010)
entry.content:
Object ACT 1000020 0010 has system status WCRE (Work center until
release).  According to this status, transaction 'Release operation is
not allowed.

entry.title: Any alternative CDS View for "I_Trrmonitor" and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube" ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for an alternative CDS View which might be available in the Public Cloud System i.e "I_Trrmonitor" and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube".

The CDS View "I_Trrmonitor" is not yet released to the customer for custom cds development; and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube" is something which we cannot utilize as this makes use of the fields/values which upload in the system and in-turn gives us the values.

The main aim to utilize these 2 CDS view is for us to capture the fields "Planned Value" & "Actual Values" from our Customer projects based on the Sales Order.

Any leads on this would be appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Search on article classification characteristics
entry.content:
hi,

Is it possible to search on article classification characteristics in the system?

br, Ralph

entry.title: Physical inventory document Count List - Printout Supplier Batch Number
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

is it possible to include the supplier batch information on the physical inventory document printout for materials tracked by batch? The reason I'm asking this is because  SAP batch number is not available physically on the item? Specifically, can the supplier’s batch number be added to the inventory list printout? 

Thank you in advance.  

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: CSRF Token for API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via OAUTH
entry.content:
Hi

I am calling the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to POST attachments via OAUTH

The API for POST of attachments requires a CSRF Token but it seems I am not able to request it using OAUTH - only Basic Authentication will return it in the x-csrf-token response header.

Why can't I use OAUTH for both?

entry.title: Purchasing categories/ SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi all, we created Purchasing Categories, there are some questions:

1. from where are displayed fields Preferred Supplier,  Strategic Supplier ? I found app Manage Preferred Supplier List - but this app is depreciated, and no successor is there 2. missing value Overall Score, there is 0, which value has to be display / from which date range ? 

3. in the part Activities - here is empty - but which info should be here, from where ?

Thanks for help.

Monika

entry.title: How to find an archiving object for a table in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we can use t-cd DB15 to easily find an archiving object for a table in on-premise.
Is there any similar function/apps or workaround we can clearly know the connection between archiving object and tables in S/4HANA public cloud?

It seems that we can only judge from the object name and description?

I also checked CDS views and seems no relevant views there..

entry.title: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?
entry.content:
I have a request from a user to modify the Balance Sheet/Income Statement program, especially the tabs and columns.

Is it possible to modify the program in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition? because as far as I know, this SAP product cannot access SAPGUI? If you can't modify the standard program, what solution can you do?

Thank You.

entry.title: Value Help RAP V4 SAP__common.ValueListReferences path ../srvd_f4/sap/..
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In the scenario of creating an SAP Fiori Elements application with RAP and OData V4 on S/4HANA Public Cloud, I'm using a standard CDS for value help consumption (e.g.  I_ProductStdVH), using the well kown and documented @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation.

If I try to preview the entity I'can't see any data from the search help:

exploring the $metadata, the endpoint redirects to a generic path "srvd_f4", and it refers to the annotation 'SAP__common.ValueListReferences' in the property of the field.

if I try to open the relative endopoint with /srvd_f4/...

I see the error Service 'I_PRODUCTSTDVH' repository 'SRVD_F4' is not assigned to group 'Z_XXXX'.

I'm in S/4HANA Public Cloud and I don't have access to /iwbep/v4_admin

In addition, I see this opened issue https://github.com/SAP/odata-library/issues/131  that seems related 

do you have any suggestions?

Thanks

entry.title: Can anyone share tutorials for Customer service processes in SAP HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Can anyone share tutorials for Customer service processes in SAP HANA PUBLIC CLOUD?

Kindly do needful.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari.B

entry.title: can I explode BOM in repair order process in customer services
entry.content:
for the in-house repair process firstly, I have created a return order with the follow-up activity in-house repair. in the in-house repair order, I have a query related below issue.

In the in-house repair order process, when we create a repair order for a material, is it possible to run MRP for that material?

when we create a return order for the in-house repair process, is it possible to apply 8 defective processes for that return material?

Can we explode BOM in repair order to know which material is needed to repair the product?

If possible, kindly let me know the process.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari.B

entry.title: Posting journal entry API causes "error "SRT: Plain SOAP: Reliable messaging (RM) configured..."
entry.content:
Hi, Experts,
I would like to post journal entry into S4 HANA cloud using "Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous)"API ". But when I post it by Postman, I get the error "SRT: Plain SOAP: Reliable messaging (RM) configured, but no Message ID and no WSRM assertion provided." in S4 HANA cloud.  Is there anyone who can find the cause?

API Reference | Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud , API , SAP S/4HANA Finance 

Below XML body was posted :

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">

    <soap:Header>

        <wsse:Security soap:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"/>

    </soap:Header>

    <soap:Body>

        <JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest xmlns="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">

            <MessageHeader>

                <ID schemeID="MSG_2024-03-28"/>

                <CreationDateTime>2024-03-28T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>

            </MessageHeader>

            <JournalEntryCreateRequest>

                <MessageHeader>

                    <ID/>

                    <CreationDateTime/>

                </MessageHeader>

                <JournalEntry>

                    <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>

                    <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>

                    <AccountingDocumentType>KR</AccountingDocumentType>

                    <DocumentReferenceID>Test</DocumentReferenceID>

                    <OriginalReferenceDocument>XXXX</OriginalReferenceDocument>

                    <DocumentHeaderText>Test</DocumentHeaderText>

                    <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>

                    <CreatedByUser>API User</CreatedByUser>

                    <DocumentDate>2024-03-28</DocumentDate>

                    <PostingDate>2024-03-28</PostingDate>

                    <Item>

                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                        <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>

                        <GLAccount listID="0065001000"/>

                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">100</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                        <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>

                        <DocumentItemText>text Test</DocumentItemText>

                        <Tax>

                            <TaxCode>V3</TaxCode>

                            <AccountAssignment>

                                <CostCenter>15101201</CostCenter>

                                <FunctionalArea>YB20</FunctionalArea>

                            </AccountAssignment>

                        </Item>

                        <CreditorItem>

                            <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                            <Creditor>15300001</Creditor>

                            <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-100

                        </AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                            <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>

                        </CreditorItem>

                    </JournalEntry>

                </JournalEntryCreateRequest>

            </JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

    </soap:Body>

</soap:Envelope>

entry.title: User exit in S/4HANA Public Cloud（COMD）
entry.content:
Hi, 

An error occurred while Performing a Costing Run. [error message CK792]

Is it possible to implement user exits in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
For example , Is it possible to implement user exit EXIT_SAPLCK21_001 (enhancement COPCP001)?

Thanks for your answer.

Regards,

entry.title: Purchase document is allocated to asset in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

I have similar issue to this post  https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/purchase-document-is-allocated-to-asset-message-no-f5378-when-doing-down/qaq-p/9705459 in SAP Public Cloud. Regarding the answers, I want to change error message to warning message. Is there anyone know the apps to make this change in SAP Public Cloud ? I already explore System Messages in CBC but I can't find the message relate to this issue. Am I able to make the change in SAP Public Cloud ?

Can anyone help me on this ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: 【Emergency】 Outputting ledger sheets using GUI application
entry.content:
伝票のPDFをGUIアプリで出力したいのですが、ヘッダー出力プレビューを押しても一部のテキストが表示されません(参考1)。
私は2つの解決策を試しました。
1つ目は、PDFを一度ローカル環境にダウンロードし、Adobe Acrobat Readerにアップロードする方法です。しかし、文字は日本語ではなく中国語で表示されていました(文献2)。
2つ目は、PDFリーダー拡張機能をChromeに適用することです。ただし、一部の文字は表示されません。

GUIアプリケーションを使って帳票を出力する場合、ヘッダ出力プレビューを押した時に、日本語の文字で一気にきれいに表示したい。
これらのイベントの解決策は何ですか?

参照1:

 

 

参照2:

entry.title: How to obtain S4HC OAUTH2 Token
entry.content:
Hi

via POSTMAN I can obtain my OAUTH2.0 Token for my S4HC public cloud system using the "Wizard" Authorization tab - Configure New Token.  

But how can I do this without using the power of that button ?   that is - can I mimic the steps myself ? i.e. I want a 3rd party application to call our APIs and I want them to do it via OAUTH.

entry.title: SAP S4 Hana Cloud trial user account
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts team,
 
Please note that my free subscription account is not available (link below)

https://my304870.s4hana.ondemand.com/ui?sap-language=EN&help-mixedLanguages=false#Shell-home

Getting error message "user account not in validity date "
 
Attaching the screen shot for your quick reference. 
 
Can you please help to extend my subscription period and provide access to my trial account.
 
Thanks,
Jeyaseelan.
